snippet.title: Mortal Kombat II | Official Trailer II
snippet.description:
The wait is almost over! Mortal Kombat II arrives in theaters and IMAX May 8. #MortalKombatMovie #FilmedForIMAX

From New Line Cinema comes the latest high-stakes installment in the blockbuster video game franchise in all its brutal glory, Mortal Kombat II. This time, the fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

Karl Urban stars as Johnny Cage, alongside Adeline Rudolph, Jessica McNamee, Josh Lawson, Ludi Lin, Mehcad Brooks, Tati Gabrielle, Lewis Tan, Damon Herriman, with Chin Han, Tadanobu Asano as Lord Raiden, Joe Taslim as Bi-Han, and Hiroyuki Sanada as Hanzo Hasashi and Scorpion.

Director Simon McQuoid returns to helm the follow up to his explosive 2021cinematic adventure, from a screenplay by Jeremy Slater, based on the videogame created by Ed Boon and John Tobias. The film is produced by Todd Garner, E. Bennett Walsh, James Wan, Toby Emmerich and Simon McQuoid, and executive produced by Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Jeremy Slater, Ed Boon and Lawrence Kasanoff.

Joining McQuoid behind the camera are director of photography Stephen F. Windon, production designer Yohei Taneda, editor Stuart Levy and costume designer Cappi Ireland, with casting by Rich Delia and music by Benjamin Wallfisch. 

New Line Cinema Presents an Atomic Monster/Broken Road Production, a Fireside Films Production, Mortal Kombat II. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX® across North America on May 8, 2026, and internationally beginning 6 May 2026.

snippet.description:
เรื่องราวความวุ่นวายของความสัมพันธ์ในกลุ่มแซฟฟิก ที่เริ่มต้นจากการกลับมาของ “แบมบี้” (ฟิล์ม รชานันท์) แฟนเก่าของ “ปริม” (น้ำตาล ทิพนารี) ที่เข้ามาในฐานะลูกค้าของบริษัททำโฆษณาที่ปริม และ “มิน” (วิว เบญญาภา) เปิดร่วมกัน โดยมีสไตลิสต์สาวรุ่นน้องของปริมอย่าง “กอหญ้า” (เลิฟ ภัทรานิษฐ์) และนางแบบสาวสวยมากเสน่ห์อย่าง “ชาช่า” (มิ้ลค์ พรรษา) รวมถึงตากล้องสาวประจำบาร์ที่มินชอบไปอย่าง “แพรว” (มิ้ม รัตนวดี) เข้ามาร่วมโปรเจกต์ด้วย ติดตามความสัมพันธ์วุ่นวายของกลุ่มสาวแซฟฟิกที่จะมาทำให้คุณได้รู้ว่ากฎของความรักบางอย่างมันก็ต้องทำตาม ไม่งั้นจะเจอกับเรื่องวุ่นวายใจเหมือนกับแก๊งนี้ ใน “GIRL RULES กฎหลัก…ห้ามรักเธอ” ทุกวันจันทร์ เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 และดูออนไลน์ เวลา 21:30 น. บนแอป iQIYI และเว็บ iQ.com ที่เดียวเท่านั้น เริ่ม 9 มีนาคมนี้

กำกับซีรีส์ : ทิชากร ภูเขาทอง 

รายชื่อนักแสดง
น้ำตาล ทิพนารี วีรวัฒโนดม  รับบท  ปริม 
ฟิล์ม รชานันท์ มหาวรรณ์  รับบท  แบมบี้
มิ้ลค์ พรรษา วอสเบียน  รับบท  ชาช่า
เลิฟ ภัทรานิษฐ์ ลิ้มปติยากร  รับบท  กอหญ้า
วิว เบญญาภา จีนประสม  รับบท  มิน
มิ้ม รัตนวดี วงค์ทอง   รับบท  แพรว
ไซซี รัตท์ริชา ประภากิติ  รับบท  แอรี่
ยู่ยี่ อลิสา อินทุสมิต   รับบท  ญานิน
มิ้น มิณฑิตา วัฒนกุล   รับบท  เจ๊แอ๊น

snippet.title: Toy Story 5 | Official Trailer | In Theaters June 19
snippet.description:
Times may change but friends are forever
#ToyStory5 is only in theaters June 19

An all-new trailer and poster for Disney and Pixar’s highly anticipated upcoming animated adventure “Toy Story 5” debut today. The toys are back and this time, Buzz Lightyear, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs are challenged when they come face-to-face with Lilypad (voice of Greta Lee), a brand-new tablet device that arrives with her own disruptive ideas about what is best for their kid, Bonnie. Will playtime ever be the same?
 
The trailer also teases the anticipated reunion of Woody and Buzz following Woody’s decision to leave the gang and start helping lost toys at the end of 2019’s “Toy Story 4.” As the toys face the tech devices of today, it’s going to be all hands on deck with some familiar and all-new characters.
 
Several actors have joined the incredible roster of voice talent including Craig Robinson as Atlas, a cheerful talking GPS hippo toy; Shelby Rabara as the excitable camera toy Snappy; Scarlett Spears as the sweet and shy 8-year-old Bonnie; Mykal-Michelle Harris as Blaze, an independent 8-year-old girl who loves animals; and Matty Matheson as the tech-fearing toy Dr. Nutcase.
 
Also rounding out the voice cast are John Ratzenberger as the wisecracking piggybank Hamm; Wallace Shawn as Rex, the anxiety-riddled tyrannosaurus rex toy; Blake Clark as the ever-loyal Slinky Dog; Jeff Bergman as the sarcastic Mr. Potato Head; Anna Vocino as the nurturing Mrs. Potato Head; Annie Potts as the adventure-loving Bo Peep; Bonnie Hunt as the wise rag-doll Dolly; Melissa Villaseñor as Karen Beverly, Bonnie’s homemade toy fashioned out of a plastic knife; John Hopkins as the dignified hedgehog plush toy Mr. Pricklepants; Kristen Schaal as the plastic triceratops toy Trixie; Ernie Hudson as the action figure Combat Carl; and Keanu Reeves as Canadian daredevil toy Duke Caboom.
 
The previously announced voice cast includes Tom Hanks (Woody), Tim Allen (Buzz Lightyear), Joan Cusack (Jessie), Greta Lee (Lilypad), Conan O’Brien (Smarty Pants) and Tony Hale (Forky).
 
“Toy Story 5” is directed by Academy Award® winner Andrew Stanton (“WALL•E,” “Finding Nemo,” “Finding Dory”), co-directed by Kenna Harris (“Ciao Alberto”), produced by Lindsey Collins (“Turning Red,” “WALL•E,” “Finding Dory”), and features an original score by Academy Award® winner Randy Newman who returns to score his fifth “Toy Story” feature. The film releases exclusively in theaters nationwide on June 19, 2026. 
 
ABOUT PIXAR:
Pixar Animation Studios, a wholly owned subsidiary of The Walt Disney Company, is an Academy Award®-winning film studio with world-renowned technical, creative and production capabilities in the art of computer animation. The Northern California studio has created some of the most successful and beloved animated films of all time, including “Toy Story,” “Monsters, Inc.,” “Cars,” “The Incredibles,” “Ratatouille,” “WALL•E,” “Up,” “Brave,” “Inside Out,” “Coco,” “Soul,” “Turning Red,” “Elemental,” and “Inside Out 2.”

snippet.title: DIOR大穎 - 人的這一生 - (Official MV) 電影《老婆，我愛你！》插曲
snippet.description:
那就讓這一切的發生 帶著我
讓我成為 更好的人✨


《人的這一生》
演唱：DIOR大穎
作詞：DIOR大穎、大牛
作曲：DIOR大穎、大牛

就走到這裡 剩我一個人
我不會怪你 丟下我 奔向更好的人
如果她可以 帶你飛向更好的旅程
我想我 可以學著忘記

需要花多長時間 看清一個人
還要花多少時間 反覆的疑問
人總不能在過去沉淪

人的這一生 要經歷過多少次的天真
要用多少次的笨 多少的青春
來換一個 更好的人

我們這一生 難道不能平凡而單純
用盡了這一生的運氣 
能不能換來一個 平庸的人生

不斷的欺騙自己 你是對的人
眼看著所有回憶 慢慢變陌生
可為什麼 我還是能為你奮不顧身 

人的這一生 要經歷過多少次的天真
要用多少次的笨 多少的青春
來換一個 更好的人

我們這一生 難道不能平凡而單純
用盡了這餘生的運氣
能不能換來一個 對的人

用盡一身的力氣 愛到忘記我自己  
沒關係  我會放下你

我 這一生 還會不會遇見更愛我的人
保護我的單純  守護我的天真
能給我足夠的安穩  

我的這一生 也許還會不斷有新傷痕
那就讓 這一切的發生 帶著我
讓我成為 更好的人

你要的是一個 在家 等你的人

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Bruno Mars - Risk It All

The Romantic – the new album from Bruno Mars, available now. Listen now: https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic

Directed by Bruno Mars & Daniel Ramos

Lyrics: 
For just a chance to win your heart
you could set the bar
beyond the stars
I’ll do anything anything you ask me to

Say you want the moon watch me learn to fly
Ain't a mountain you could point to i wouldn’t climb
It's crazy but it’s true. There’s nothing I won't do. 
I’d risk it all for you

To hold your hand and call you mine
I’m trynna be your man
til the end of time
oh i’ll do anything, anything you ask me to

I would run through the fire just to be by your side
if your heart’s on the line you could take mine
It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do. 
I'd risk it all for you

I would swim across the sea just to show you
sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on to prove that you belong
here in my arms

Say you want the moon watch me, learn to fly
ain’t a mountain you could point to I wouldn’t climb

It's crazy but it’s true. There's nothing I won’t do
I’d risk it all for you (2x)

Join Bruno’s mailing list: https://drop.cobrand.com/d/BrunoMars/Subscribe

Connect with Bruno:

https://www.instagram.com/brunomars

https://brunomars.com

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

snippet.title: New Community Event: Unleash the Duke
snippet.description:
Dragon Duke needs to be freed, and he’s counting on all of you.

Starting tomorrow, jump into the Unleash the Duke Community Event, available in-game.

Navigate the dungeon, complete objectives, and choose one of the three new doors every day - each hiding different rewards. Push all the way to the final door, and everyone will unlock the Dragon Statue.

Free the Duke!
_______

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans

TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

snippet.title: AGY - LaLa Raya (Official Music Video) 4K
snippet.description:
Subscribe & Follow Us »»  http://bit.ly/2l4KXs9
♬Apple Music  »» https://bit.ly/4auQi3i
♬Spotify »» https://bit.ly/4cEaC3p

"LaLa Raya” ialah lagu Hari Raya terbaru AGY untuk tahun 2026 yang membawakan vibe Raya moden, ceria, catchy dan mudah sing-along, sambil mengangkat momen yang semua orang boleh relate seperti persiapan OOTD, suasana balik kampung dan kemeriahan berkumpul bersama keluarga. Dilancarkan bersama video muzik rasmi, karya ini bukan sekadar hiburan, tetapi satu refleksi tentang Raya hari ini: antara “content” dan rasa sebenar, sebelum akhirnya mengajak penonton kembali kepada perkara paling penting—hadir menikmati momen dan menghargai kebersamaan. #LaLaRaya #AGY 

LALA RAYA | LIRIK

[Verse 1]
Saat Ketupat Dihidang
Bersama Wajik Dan Kuah Kacang
Melenggang Lenggang Eh Bergaya
Pukul Dua Ke Dapur Juga

[Verse 2]
Gema Suara Takbir Di Pagi Hari
Buka Lah Mata Siap OOTD
Semua Dah Ready Nak FYP
Siap Prac'ce Malam Ke Pagi

[Pre-Chorus]
Raya Raya Raya Raya Ya
I Sudah Ready Berbaju Raya
Raya Raya Raya Raya Ya
Selamat Hari Raya

[Chorus]
Duit Disampul Kuih Di Balang
Lagu Lama Forever Di Dendang
Berkunjungan Berkasih Sayang
Jauh Dekat Semua Kembali Pulang

[Verse 3]
Lampu Pelita Terang Berseri
Berdentam Dentum Bunga Api
Dengan Doa Kita Mulakan
Samudera Bahagia

[Post Chorus]
Raya Raya Raya
Raya Raya Raya
Lala Lala Lala Raya Raya
Meriah Raya Bersama
Raya Raya Raya
Selamat Hari Raya

[Rap]
Selamat Be Be Berhari Raya
Meriahnya Bersama Keluarga
Eh Adik Abang Kakak Semuanya
Sedondon Kita Semua Bergaya
Paklong Sibuk Eh Tolong Tolong
Merah Mak Ngah Eh Berkebarong
Yang Lain Sibuk Menggosok Tudung
Its Hari Raya Lets Sing It Along

[Ulang Post Chorus]

snippet.title: Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 (FULL GAME)
snippet.description:
Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Full Gameplay Walkthrough with Thinknoodles of Poppy Playtime Chapter 5. This video is the full Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 Ending, Broken Things. This is Poppy Playtime's biggest and most terrifying chapter yet, facing off against the Prototype and Huggy Wuggy. In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. New hands permit new and creative ways to explore with a new Grabpack. The Prototype's face will finally be revealed. LWill you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?
🍜 SUBSCRIBE - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UChd1FPXykD4pust3ljzq6hQ?sub_confirmation=1
👉 BECOME A MEMBER - https://www.youtube.com/thinknoodles/join
🤖 Discord: https://discord.gg/thinknoodles

Face off against the deadly puppetmaster behind the horrifying events of Playtime Co.

In the latest terrifying chapter of the Poppy Playtime saga (Chapter 5), you are propelled further into the gruesome depths of the factory, with Playtime’s security system Huggy Wuggy in hot pursuit. 

Abandoned by your only allies, your fight for survival gets all the more challenging as you race further into the abyss that is His domain. 

Here, shadows whisper, and the puppet master who lords over this realm pulls the strings of madness. Can you stand against evil and finally put an end to this nightmare? Every bloody move forward will test your resolve as you uncover secrets years in the making.

Features:

Stomach-churning terrors await you in this new section of the factory as you uncover the dark works hidden within The Prototype’s stomping grounds.

In this chilling new layer of the Playtime facility, you will encounter the tortured denizens living in the darkness. They may aid you in your quest to defeat The Prototype, but can they be trusted? 

Solve devious puzzles and overcome dangerous environmental obstacles with the power of new GrabPack tools and functionality.

As you reach the true rotten heart at the center of Playtime, you will discover some of the company’s gravest sins.

Will you escape this new realm of shadows with your sanity intact, or will you succumb to the horrors within?

Chapters 📚
00:00:00 Cinematic Opening & Chapter 5 Start
00:03:12 Huggy Wuggy Chase Tutorial Escape
00:30:28 Meeting Giblet
00:32:43 First Prototype Encounter
00:41:55 Bron & GrabPack 3.0
00:45:40 New Pressure Hand
00:57:56 Limon Easter Egg
01:09:16 Meeting Chum Chompkins
01:22:31 Magnetic Bracelets
01:36:09 Prototype Returns
01:53:47 Huggy Memory: “I’ve Always Been a Toy”
02:07:53 Blue VHS Tape
02:14:36 Playing As Huggy Wuggy
02:25:24 Entering Sweet Street
02:33:56 Meeting Lily Lovebraids
02:35:57 Finding Kissy Missy & Poppy
03:03:18 Prototype Face Reveal
03:30:23 Huggy & Kissy Reunion
